steps.title: Recognize the equation structure
steps.content: The equation $21h + 10c = 900$ represents total weekly earnings. Since each term is (coefficient) × (hours), the coefficients must represent hourly rates (dollars per hour). The structure is: (hourly rate at job 1) × (hours at job 1) + (hourly rate at job 2) × (hours at job 2) = total earnings.

steps.title: Identify what 21 multiplies
steps.content: In the equation, 21 multiplies $h$, which is defined as the number of hours worked at her regular job. Since 21 is the coefficient of the hours variable for the regular job, 21 must represent the hourly rate earned at that job. That matches choice A — A is correct.
